tracks.meaning: a piece of writing on a specific subject published in a newspaper, magazine, journal, or online publication
a clause or section of a legal document, contract, agreement, or statute
a word or phrase, typically a noun or pronoun, used in a sentence to denote a thing or concept
a commodity or item offered for sale or trade
a separate item or section in a printed work or publication
a movable part of the body, particularly a limb or joint in anatomy and medicine
a thing or object of any kind, used in a vague or dismissive manner
